episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 443: Duskmourn Spoilers Continue
episode.description: Cliff and James get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and then walk through week two of Duskmourn spoilers looking for hot new cards.
